playlist_strategy: High-intensity interval training requires extreme energy peaks and fast-paced driving beats to maintain adrenaline levels. This playlist is structured to provide explosive, aggressive EDM, Trap, and Tech House tracks with massive bass drops, aggressive synths, and relentless tempos ranging from 128 to 150 BPM to push athletes to their absolute limits.

tracks.title: Adrenaline Spike
tracks.youtube_title: BRUTAL HIIT WORKOUT MUSIC 🔥 Adrenaline Spike (Aggressive Bass)
tracks.listening_scenario: HIIT warm-up and first interval block
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive Bass House, driving beat, distorted bassline, intense buildup, explosive drop, workout energy
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic shot of a muscular athlete sprinting in a dark urban environment illuminated by glowing neon red lights, sweat flying, intense expression, high contrast
tracks.youtube_description: Kick off your HIIT session with 'Adrenaline Spike'. Massive bass drops and a relentless 128 BPM rhythm designed to get your heart rate up instantly! Subscribe for more intense workout music.

tracks.title: Limit Breaker
tracks.youtube_title: INSANE HIIT ENERGY ⚡ Limit Breaker (Trap/EDM Workout Mix)
tracks.style_prompt: Hard Trap EDM, massive 808 bass, aggressive brass stabs, fast hi-hats, explosive workout energy, 150 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: Dynamic angle of a fitness model doing an explosive box jump, sparks flying in the background, hyper-realistic, electric yellow lighting accents
tracks.youtube_description: Push past your breaking point with 'Limit Breaker'. Hard Trap EDM at 150 BPM to fuel your most intense explosive intervals. Don't quit!

tracks.title: Heart Rate Max
tracks.youtube_title: HEART RATE MAX 🚀 Explosive HIIT Cardio Music 2026
tracks.style_prompt: Tech House, rolling bassline, hypnotic synth loop, aggressive percussion, club energy, workout focus
tracks.image_prompt: Close up of a stationary bike wheel spinning at extremely high speed, blur effect, glowing cyan neon lighting in a dark modern gym setting
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the pedals spinning and the feet moving. 'Heart Rate Max' delivers an unstoppable Tech House groove for sustained high-intensity efforts.

tracks.title: Burn Phase
tracks.youtube_title: FEEL THE BURN 🔥 Unstoppable Dubstep HIIT Workout
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive Brostep, heavy bass drops, screeching synths, massive build-ups, extreme workout energy, 145 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: Heavy battle ropes being slammed down in a dramatic dark gym, chalk dust exploding in the air, illuminated by intense inferno orange lighting
tracks.youtube_description: Time to empty the tank! 'Burn Phase' brings massive brostep drops and chaotic energy to fuel your hardest HIIT intervals.

tracks.title: Sweat Equity
tracks.youtube_title: SWEAT EQUITY 💧 Fast Paced Cardio & HIIT Motivation
tracks.style_prompt: Liquid Drum and Bass, extremely fast breakbeats, deep sub bass, high energy, athletic speed training, 174 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: Action shot of a runner's shoes hitting the pavement raining, water splashing, neon green lighting reflecting off the wet ground, ultra-fast motion blur
tracks.youtube_description: Speed up your tempo with 'Sweat Equity'. High-speed Drum and Bass at 174 BPM for sprint intervals and fast agility footwork!

tracks.title: Iron Lungs
tracks.youtube_title: BREATHE & CONQUER 🛡️ Iron Lungs (Epic Gym Music)
tracks.listening_scenario: Heavy resistance HIIT or active recovery
tracks.style_prompt: Cyberpunk midtempo bass, industrial drums, gritty synthetic textures, dark heavy pulse, workout determination
tracks.image_prompt: Cyberpunk glowing kettlebell swinging in motion, dark futuristic gym, magenta and cyan neon lights, photorealistic, cinematic
tracks.youtube_description: Catch your breath but keep the intensity high. 'Iron Lungs' delivers heavy, dark cyberpunk beats for resistance-based HIIT intervals.

tracks.title: Zone State
tracks.youtube_title: ENTER THE ZONE 🌀 Flow State HIIT Workout Anthem
tracks.listening_scenario: Final push of a gruelling workout
tracks.style_prompt: Big Room High-Tech EDM, festival anthem lead, massive hardstyle kick, euphoric energy, triumphant workout climax, 138 BPM
tracks.image_prompt: A triumphant athlete pouring water over their head in slow motion, bright electric blue backlighting, epic gym atmosphere, high definition
tracks.youtube_description: You are almost there. 'Zone State' is a massive festival-style gym anthem designed to push you through the pain barrier!

tracks.title: Repetition
tracks.style_prompt: Hard industrial techno, relentless distorted rumble kick, acid 303 lines, hypnotic dark energy, warehouse rave workout
tracks.image_prompt: Abstract representation of heartbeats turning into red soundwaves, pitch black background, sleek modern design, highly energetic
tracks.youtube_description: Get lost in the rhythm. 'Repetition' brings warehouse hard techno to your gym session for relentless, unbreakable focus.

tracks.title: Final Countdown
tracks.youtube_title: 1 MINUTE LEFT 🕒 Final Countdown extreme HIIT mix
tracks.listening_scenario: The absolute final interval of the session
tracks.style_prompt: Dirty electro house, hype vocal chants, aggressive synth plucks, chaotic high energy, perfect workout finisher
tracks.image_prompt: A glowing digital stop watch hitting zero seconds, glowing neon orange and purple, sweat droplets on the glass face, sharp focus
tracks.youtube_description: Empty the tank! The final interval is here. Let the dirty electro beats of 'Final Countdown' force you across the finish line!

tracks.title: Endorphin Rush
tracks.youtube_title: COOL DOWN & RECOVER 🌊 Endorphin Rush (Chill Trap)
tracks.style_prompt: Chill trap, future bass, lush atmospheric chords, smooth 808 bass, calm but triumphant, post-workout cool down music
tracks.image_prompt: Silhouette of an athlete stretching against a beautiful soft pink and blue sunrise sky, peaceful atmosphere, calm water reflection
tracks.youtube_description: You did it. Now bring the heart rate down and stretch it out with 'Endorphin Rush'. Perfect chill trap for your post-workout recovery.
